children.text: void the participation agreement between the Secretary and the rural business investment company; and
cause the rural business investment company to forfeit all of the rights and privileges derived by the rural business investment company under this subchapter.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Before the Secretary may cause a rural business investment company to forfeit rights or privileges under subsection (a), a court of the United States of competent jurisdiction must find that the rural business investment company committed a violation, or failed to comply, in a cause of action brought for that purpose in the district, territory, or other place subject to the jurisdiction of the United States, in which the principal office of the rural business investment company is located.

children.heading: Parties authorized to file causes of action
children.label: 2 Parties authorized to file causes of action
children.text: Each cause of action brought by the United States under this subsection shall be brought by the Secretary or by the Attorney General.
